name: vortos/vortos-metrics
description: Vortos metrics — Prometheus, StatsD and NoOp adapters with auto-instrumentation

suggest.open-telemetry/sdk: Required for the OpenTelemetry OTLP metrics adapter
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Required as a PSR-18 HTTP client for OTLP export
suggest.vortos/vortos-cache: Required for Redis-backed Prometheus storage (FrankenPHP multi-process)
suggest.vortos/vortos-cqrs: Required for CQRS command metrics auto-instrumentation
suggest.vortos/vortos-messaging: Required for event bus metrics auto-instrumentation
